alt: Two cruise ships docked at the Amber Cove cruise terminal in Puerto Plata, Dominican Republic, with thatched-roof overwater bungalows of the resort village in the foreground
description: Two cruise ships docked at Amber Cove cruise terminal in Maimon Bay, Puerto Plata province, Dominican Republic. The signature thatched-roof overwater bungalows of the Amber Cove resort village are in the foreground, with sea grape vegetation along the shoreline. Photographed 6 February 2023.
title: Terminal de Cruceros Amber Cove
